key.name: use-lingmo-auth
key.description: If enabled, use Lingmo Auth. If disabled, will not use Lingmo Auth.

key.name: sleep
key.description: If enabled, suspend operation display If disabled, suspend operation does not show.

key.name: hibernate
key.description: If enabled, hibernate operation display If disabled, hibernate operation does not show.

key.name: switchuser
key.description: 0: always show switch user button 1: ondemand show switch user button 2: disabled show switch user button
